summary: Implemented the M2 client map surface over client read-model slices: protocol result DTO types, a 30 district/10 settlement M2 client fixture projected from economy and route-preview DTOs, MapRenderer render plans/deltas with presentation-cache rebuild tests, and web UI controls for seasonal/economy/routes modes, zoom, district selection, and settlement selection.

tests_run.result: Showed task implementation changes plus pre-existing lead-owned orchestration changes in project/goal-mode-state.json, project/model-routing-state.json, project/tasks/active/M2-CLIENT-MAP-001.json, project/tasks/thread-registry.json, and route message.
1 test file passed; 5 tests passed, including M2 30 district/10 settlement protocol read-model projection.
1 test file passed; 2 tests passed, including mode render plans and replace-read-model presentation-cache rebuild.
1 test file passed; 3 tests passed, including M2 map controls and fixture-count render coverage.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism hashes matched; 19 root Vitest files/89 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.
2 Playwright tests passed, covering map load, zoom, district selection, settlement selection, mode switching, and M2 read-model counts.

tests_run.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='project/tasks/active/M2-CLIENT-MAP-001.json'; const t=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); const required=['id','summary','status','owner_role','reviewer_role','scope','acceptance_criteria','required_tests','branch_or_worktree']; for (const key of required) { if (!(key in t)) throw new Error('missing '+key); } if (t.id !== 'M2-CLIENT-MAP-001') throw new Error('wrong id'); if (!Array.isArray(t.scope.allowed_paths) || !Array.isArray(t.scope.forbidden_paths)) throw new Error('bad scope'); console.log('M2-CLIENT-MAP-001 task JSON shape ok');"

tests_run.result: format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture check passed.

decisions: Kept React state to UI intent only: selected map entity, map mode, zoom, filtering, sorting, and list scroll.
Added protocol result DTO types matching existing sim-core query outputs without adding new query kinds or changing sim-core.
Projected selected district details and route summaries from protocol/read-model DTOs in client-core, then consumed those read models in UI.
Kept MapRenderer as the presentation-cache owner for render plans and replace-read-model rebuild semantics; tests verify cache rebuild without React-managed DisplayObjects.
Used Playwright rather than adding Storybook files because the root .storybook directory is outside the user-specified allowed paths.
risks: The web M2 map uses a protocol-shaped client fixture until live worker query integration is scheduled; this follows the known M2 risk that live projection is not fully wired.

The browser-visible map surface is an SVG/DOM operational surface while MapRenderer render-plan and rebuild behavior is covered in package tests; systems_architect should review whether a follow-up should mount Pixi directly in the web shell.
Existing Vite warning remains for apps/web/src/worker/hello-simulation-adapter.mjs dynamic import; this was pre-existing and not changed here.
requested_action: Review architecture boundaries, read-model/protocol projection shape, MapRenderer ownership, and whether Pixi mounting should be a follow-up before acceptance.
